channel.title: Visa & Status on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Visa & Status on Expat Japan

item.title: How to Change Your Visa Status in Japan (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Need to change your visa type in Japan? Here's how to apply for a change of status, what documents you need, and how long it takes.

item.title: How to Get Permanent Residency in Japan (Foreigner's Guide 2025)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to applying for permanent residency in Japan as a foreigner. Requirements, documents, timeline, and tips to improve your chances.

item.title: Types of Work Visa in Japan Explained (2025 Complete Guide)
item.description: A clear explanation of every type of work visa in Japan — Engineer, Tokutei Gino, Skilled Labor, and more. Find out which visa is right for you.

item.title: How to Renew Your Work Visa in Japan (Step-by-Step Guide 2025)
item.description: A complete step-by-step guide to renewing your work visa in Japan. When to apply, what documents you need, and how long it takes.
